creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
GIMP 2.2.15,2 dies immedaitely with the following error on several independent
platforms and different versions of FreeBSD when trying to do something,
especially painting with a pencil. This renders GIMP useless.

Error:

hartmann: The program 'gimp' received an X Window System error.
This probably reflects a bug in the program.
The error was 'BadWindow (invalid Window parameter)'.
  (Details: serial 60865 error_code 3 request_code 39 minor_code 0)
  (Note to programmers: normally, X errors are reported asynchronously;
   that is, you will receive the error a while after causing it.
   To debug your program, run it with the --sync command line
   option to change this behavior. You can then get a meaningful
   backtrace from your debugger if you break on the gdk_x_error() function.)

(script-fu:50078): LibGimpBase-WARNING **: script-fu: wire_read(): error
